narrative:
Hicksville Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 1,014 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
